title: Boiling Water
description: Learn how to boil water safely and effectively for cooking.

steps.instruction: Fill a pot with cold water and place it on the stove.
Turn the heat to high and cover the pot with a lid to speed up the boiling process.
Once the water reaches a rolling boil, you can add your ingredients or turn off the heat if not needed.

safety_tips: Be careful when removing the lid to avoid steam burns.
Always use pot holders when handling hot pots.
